name: Astronauts: Do You Have What It Takes?
original_name: Astronauts: Do You Have What It Takes?
overview: Millions dream of going into space, but how many of us have what it takes? Astronaut Chris Hadfield and his expert team will choose one winner from 12 exceptional applicants.

trailers.title: Astronauts: Do you have what it takes? | Trailer - BBC Two
